decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id (corridor_nostrand-avenue) matches the existing registry record. The observation already resolves to that canonical record — the 9.3-mile Nostrand/Rogers SBS corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, served by B44 in Brooklyn, with streets Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
Currently served by B44 bus route

The map illustrates the Nostrand Ave Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) route, which runs parallel to the Nostrand Avenue corridor. The route is divided into two main sections: the Northbound section on Rogers Avenue and the Southbound section on Nostrand Avenue.

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id (corridor_rogers-avenue) matches the existing registry record. The observation already resolves to that canonical record — Rogers Avenue is the northbound SBS section of the Nostrand/Rogers corridor, part of the 9.3-mile route from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the Nostrand Ave Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) route, which runs parallel to the Nostrand Avenue corridor. The route is divided into two main sections: the Northbound section on Rogers Avenue and the Southbound section on Nostrand Avenue.

proposed_relations.description: Rogers Avenue is the northbound SBS section of the broader Nostrand/Rogers corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the Nostrand Ave Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) route, which runs parallel to the Nostrand Avenue corridor. The route is divided into two main sections: the Northbound section on Rogers Avenue and the Southbound section on Nostrand Avenue.
